'''Bedara''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]]. Like all planets in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], it was destroyed, when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprentice [[Kyp Durron]] unleashed the [[Sun Crusher]] there.

{{Planet-stub}}
